name: Terraria Wands
description: Replace the wands with versions from Terraria!/nThree options are provided:/n14x14 pixel version, original texture version, and hybrid version (default)./nWhile CustomPD supports textures of different sizes, overly large textures will look particularly poor and unnatural. The hybrid version only replaces oversized textures with the 14x14 versions./nThe three versions can be switched manually by renaming the corresponding folders./nThe wards texture for the wandofwarding is currently being redrawn./nweapon texture replacements may be added in the future.
author: 罐装狐腻
